zh.lifeSummary: 當Rhys ap Hywel於1210年出生在英國威爾斯布雷康史爾格拉斯波利時，他的父親Hywel ap Trahaearn41歲，母親Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor34歲。他於1255年與Catrin verch Gruffudd在威爾士結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1255年5月22日享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rhys ap Hywel于1210年出生在英国威尔斯布雷康史爾格拉斯波利时，他的父亲Hywel ap Trahaearn41岁，母亲Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor34岁。他于1255年与Catrin verch Gruffudd在威尔士结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1255年5月22日享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rhys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional name meaning ‘ardour’; borne in the Middle Ages by various rulers in south-west Wales, including  Rhys ap Tewdur  (  d. 1093 ) and  Rhys ap Gruffudd  (  1132–97 ).

variants.name: Reece
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Rhys . The name is now in widespread and frequent use outside Wales, in many cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the given name.

variants.name: Rees
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Welsh Rhys, in some cases representing a transferred use of the surname so spelled, which is derived from the Welsh given name.

nameMeanings.name: ap
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of any of the names beginning with this syllable.

variants.name: Alexander
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Alan
meanings: Of Celtic origin and uncertain derivation (possibly a diminutive of a word meaning ‘rock’). It was introduced into England by Breton followers of William the Conqueror , most notably Alan , Earl of Brittany, who was rewarded for his services with vast estates in the newly conquered kingdom. In Britain the variants Allan and Allen are considerably less frequent, and generally represent transferred uses of surname forms, whereas in America all three forms of the name are approximately equally common. See also Alun .

variants.name: Albert
meanings: From an Old French name, Albert, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from adal ‘noble’ + berht ‘bright, famous’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, displacing the Old English form Æþelbeorht. The name is popular in a variety of forms in Western Europe, and has been traditional in a number of European princely families. It was out of favour in England for centuries, however, and the revival of its popularity in the 19th century was largely in honour of Queen Victoria's consort, Prince Albert of Saxe-Coburg-Gotha .

nameMeanings.name: Hywel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Hywell
meanings: Traditional: originally a byname from a vocabulary word meaning ‘eminent, conspicuous’; it was common in the Middle Ages and was revived in the 20th-century.

variants.name: Howell
meanings: Anglicized form of the Welsh name Hywel , or a transferred use of the surname derived from that name.

en.lifeSummary: When Rhys ap Hywel was born in 1210, in Glasbury, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Hywel ap Trahaearn, was 41 and his mother, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, was 34. He married Catrin verch Gruffudd in 1255, in Wales. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died on 22 May 1255, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rhys ap Hywel est né en 1210, à Glasbury, Breconshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hywel ap Trahaearn, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Catrin verch Gruffudd en 1255, à Galles. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé le 22 mai 1255, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rhys ap Hywel 1210 in Glasbury, Breconshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hywel ap Trahaearn 41 und seine Mutter Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor 34. Er hat 1255 in Wales Catrin verch Gruffudd geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb am 22. Mai 1255 im Alter von 45 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Hywel è nato il nel 1210 nel Glasbury, Breconshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Hywel ap Trahaearn, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Catrin verch Gruffudd nel 1255, nel Galles. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì il 22 maggio 1255, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Hywelが1210年にイギリスウェールズブレコンシュアイアグラスブリーで生まれた時，父Hywel ap Trahaearnは41歳，母Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevorは34歳であった。1255年にウェールズでCatrin verch Gruffuddと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1255年5月22日に45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rhys ap Hywel(이)가 1210년 영국 웨일스 브레콘실르 글라스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hywel ap Trahaearn(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1255년 웨일스에서 Catrin verch Gruffudd(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1255년 5월 22일 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Rhys ap Hywel nasceu em 1210, em Glasbury, Breconshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hywel ap Trahaearn, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Catrin verch Gruffudd em 1255, em Gales. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 22 de maio de 1255, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rhys ap Hywel родился в 1210 г. в местности гласбури, брекуншир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hywel ap Trahaearn было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Catrin verch Gruffudd в 1255 г. в местности Уэльс. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер 22 мая 1255 г. в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rhys ap Hywel nació en 1210, en Glasbury, Breconshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Hywel ap Trahaearn, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Nest verch Gruffudd of Dynevor, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Catrin verch Gruffudd en 1255, en Gales. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió el 22 de mayo de 1255, a la edad de 45 años.
